title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese presents 3 rules and 6 leadership moves for building projects with Claude Code, framed as a playbook derived from Y Combinator CEO Gary Tan's advice. The video covers what not to build, what to build, and how to position oneself as an AI team leader.
